publishedAbstract: * Diskmaker pods logs error **unable to add disk-id** every 5 seconds, when OCS is deployed using LSO. ~~~ E0922 16:37:40.778533 1 diskmaker.go:278] unable to add disk-id /dev/disk/by-id/scsi-123 to local disk pool: unable to find device with id /dev/disk/by-id/scsi-123 ~~~
publishedTitle: Diskmaker pods logs error "unable to add disk-id" every 5 seconds, when OCS is deployed using LSO.
